author: doll-agent
content: Added explicit basis-conversion free functions on coefficient slices: poly2cheb / cheb2poly, poly2leg / leg2poly, poly2lag / lag2poly, poly2herm / herm2poly, poly2herme / herme2poly. Each pivots through the existing FromPowerBasis / ToPowerBasis traits. Round-trip tests verify poly→cheb→poly and poly→leg→poly preserve coefficients within 1e-10. The instance-level ConvertBasis::convert<T>() trait method on Poly objects remains unchanged.
